ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-31-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark A. Senick, via Zoom, for and with Timothy N. Thornburn, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges Mr. Senick's efforts with this matter. Mr. Senick reports of successfully contacting Peter Schwartz, the attorney who allegedly held the original will. A declaration regarding the preceding has been filed. The court queries counsel regarding any known objections to this petition. Mr. Senick advises that he is unaware of any objections. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated Oct-03-1990 is admitted to probate. Timothy N. Thornburn is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Oct-31-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Continued To Oct-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark A. Senick, via Zoom, for Timothy N. Thornburn, Petitioner; Sheryl McQuaid, via Zoom, Interested Party.

The court confirms with Ms. McQuaid that she has no standing in this matter. The court and Mr. Senick discuss his efforts to contact Peter Schwartz who is the attorney who allegedly accepted the original will for safekeeping. The court advises Mr. Senick that it would like to see additional efforts to contact Mr. Schwartz regarding the purported original will and file a declaration regarding the preceding accordingly.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Oct-11-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Continued To Sep-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
